description_long: This is an ornate necklace featuring a series of blue and green floral motifs, each flower composed of petal-like elements radiating from a central gemstone. The flowers are linked together to form a continuous chain that gracefully curves to fit around the neck. The petals are deep blue with hints of green, and the centers of the flowers appear to be set with sparkling stones, possibly sapphires or emeralds. The necklace is displayed on a white, contoured jewelry bust, which highlights the vivid colors and intricate detailing of the piece. The back of the necklace is a simple green band, providing a subtle contrast to the elaborate front. The overall design is elegant and eye-catching, suitable for formal occasions or as a statement piece in an urban setting.
description: A floral-themed necklace with blue and green gemstone flowers linked in a chain, displayed on a white bust. The design is ornate and vibrant, with intricate petal details and sparkling centers.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full floral necklace with blue and green flowers and gemstone centers, prominently displayed on a white bust.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the necklace's profile, showing the thickness of the floral elements and the green band extending around the neck.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the simple green band of the necklace, with minimal floral detail visible, emphasizing the closure area.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, highlighting the layered floral motifs and the way the necklace curves around the bust.
